name: Sandy Brooke
bio: Sandy Brooke serves as the Mayor of Nacogdoches, the oldest town in Texas and home to Stephen F. Austin State University. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to promote economic development, support the university community, and preserve the city's rich historical heritage.
campaignPromises: Strengthen the partnership between the city and SFA University
Promote Nacogdoches as a tourist and cultural destination
